base_url.description: Kyriba tenant REST API base URL override. Kyriba deployments vary by tenant; defaults to https://api.kyriba.com/api/v1.

token_url.description: Kyriba OAuth2 client-credentials token endpoint override. Defaults to https://api.kyriba.com/oauth/token.

client_secret.description: Kyriba OAuth2 client-credentials client secret. Never logged.

scope.description: Optional OAuth2 scope requested at token exchange. Left unset, no scope is sent (Kyriba tenant defaults apply).
